command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4BdzgLF4GXyBwp9.root --database AjMw55p7jRc9aMyZzMJuCD --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE pending_payrolls;
stdout:
Table	Create Table
pending_payrolls	CREATE TABLE `pending_payrolls` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `group_id` int NOT NULL,
  `employee_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `employee_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `position` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `base_salary` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `net_salary` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `advance_amount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `vt_daily` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `va_monthly` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `competence_month` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `competence_year` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `raw_data` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `pdf_url` varchar(500) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=150001
